title: Velvety Australian Colby Jack Mousse
description: A sugarfree, creamy mousse that blends Colby Jack cheese with coconut milk and a touch of vanilla for a tropical twist.
instructions: Finely chop the Colby Jack cheese into small cubes.
Heat a large saucepan over low heat, add the cheese and a splash of coconut milk, stirring gently until the cheese melts into a smooth sauce – about 5 minutes.
In a separate bowl whisk the heavy cream to soft peaks.
Fold the melted cheese mixture into the whipped cream, then stir in stevia, vanilla extract, lime zest and a pinch of salt until fully combined.
Transfer the mousse to a shallow dish, cover, and refrigerate for at least 3 hours or until set.
Serve chilled, optionally topped with a drizzle of coconut cream or fresh lime slices.
